This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into on the 15th day of November 2023, by and between Quantum Innovations Pte Ltd, a company incorporated in Singapore with UEN 202312345K and its registered office at 123 Fusion Drive, Singapore 567890, and Dr. Emily Tan, NRIC S7654321B, residing at 456 Orchard Lane, Singapore 234567.

1. Confidentiality Obligations: The Recipient agrees to maintain the confidentiality of all proprietary information disclosed by the Discloser, including, but not limited to, financial data, customer lists, and trade secrets. The Recipient shall not disclose any confidential information to third parties without prior written consent from the Discloser.

2. Term and Termination: This Agreement shall commence on the Effective Date and continue for a period of two (2) years. Either party may terminate this Agreement by providing thirty (30) days written notice to the other party. Upon termination, the Recipient must return or destroy all confidential information.

Contact Information: For any inquiries, please contact Mr. John Lim at +65 6123 4567 or john.lim@quantuminnovations.sg.
